nodes.name: 眼镜鸮
nodes.summary: 眼镜鸮（Spectacled owl，学名 Pulsatrix perspicillata），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联25个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括热带雨林、成熟森林、稀树草原。

nodes.name: 尼加拉瓜
nodes.summary: 尼加拉瓜是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联124种鸟类，包括山冠雉、Yucatan bobwhite、Spot-bellied bobwhite等124种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The spectacled owl (Pulsatrix perspicillata) also called a Murucututu, is a large tropical owl native to the neotropics

links.key: bird-眼镜鸮-e3f3b922__distributed_in__loc-约翰-莱瑟姆-鸟类学家-1edb5695
links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The spectacled owl (Pulsatrix perspicillata) also called a Murucututu, is a large tropical owl native to the neotropics

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Park, Costa Rica]] The spectacled owl is found in Mexico, Central America (Belize, Guatemala, El Salvador, Honduras, Nicaragua, Costa Rica, Panama), Trinidad and Tobago, and South America (Colombia, Venezuela, Suriname, French Guiana, Guyana, Paraguay, Ecuador, Peru, Bolivia, Brazil, Argentina). The spectacled owl is primarily a bird of tropical rainforests, being found mostly in areas where dense, old-growth forest is profuse
